json.postContent: Been a minute since I posted one of these - But it's been just over a year hosting/producing the CBS News Radio Entertainment Update! We've had substantial growth and it's now heard on over 100 affiliates across America in cities like Boston, Dallas, Green Bay, DC...annnnnd even in the Bahamas on ZBFR-FM! 🏝️ - Radio Peeps! Below is an example of the content you get daily with the report. If interested in signing up - hit up Amy Bolton for more info! #radio #entertainment #entertainmentnews #popculture #film #movies #hollywood #amfm #newsradio
json.author: Matt Wolfe

json.postContent: When work family, IS family. Whether its TV or Radio, journalists, producers, writers, engineers, stage managers, reporters, anchors - all spend countless hours finessing, flexing, crafting and building their respective shows 5-days a week for hours at a clip. It's no small task. If you're lucky, you inevitably share the good and the bad events - the triumphs and inevitable failures. You do it...As. A. Unit. Much love to the NBCUniversal family and the Today Show Staff as they navigate some very uncharted...and yet familiar territory here. #NBC #SavannahGuthrie #NetworkNews #TheTodayShow #MorningShow https://lnkd.in/eyMGTDW8
json.author: Matt Wolfe

json.postContent: Starting off 2026 on a high note! 😆 Lots to dig into on all this. Granted how we consume movies has changed - but for many this is a major red flag. Curious to hear your thoughts on the matter and if the merger goes through...WILL Netflix indeed scuttle the traditional release windows and rollouts? #film #cinema #entertainment #netflix #warnerbrothers #popculture #entertainmentnews https://lnkd.in/eZJ7i_mb
json.author: Matt Wolfe

json.postContent: 🎄Final post here for 2025! Gratitude to all these iconic brands for allowing me to play radio in their space and let me run amok with news, traffic, weather, music and entertainment content! Laskov, I. Chris Lloyd Amy Bolton Jessica D'Agostin Ben Mevorach Katelin Tinley truly... what are you all thinking? 😂 See you in 2026! #radio #terrestrialradio #1010WINS #WBAB #WBLI #radioexpress #cbsnewsradio #entertainmentnews #popculture #newsradio #musicradio
json.author: Matt Wolfe

json.postContent: ⬇️ ⬇️  They say put your mind to it, envision it, manifest it. Welp. Something worked! Myself and the Radio Express team are beyond happy to finally announce the start of Trendline: A new syndicated entertainment news feature targeting English-language radio stations in the UK and Europe - coming in early 2026! Have a look at the crazy-good intro video put together by the Radio Express team with outstanding camera/field work by Tony Spina and Erin Leonard (and no, that NYC shot is NOT AI! 😆 ) Huge thanks to Jessica D'Agostin, Laskov, I. and Paul Hollins for having faith in this pop-culture obsessed nutcase to bring something like this to life. Details in the comments, and if you want to know more, DM Jessica D'Agostin! #trendline #radioexpress #radio #entertainmentnews #popculture #film #music #streaming #movies #entertainment #interviews #europe #radiofreeeurope⬇️ ⬇️
json.author: Matt Wolfe
